subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond all mention and tribute, befitteth the threshold of the Lord of Names, Who through His complete power and the attraction of His Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و ثنا لایق بساط مالک اسماست که بقدرت کامله و جذب کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
